creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 187549
shar archive with a new port

SPOPS: Simple Perl Object Persistence with Security
https://sourceforge.net/projects/spops/

- This port is needed as a new dependency for future 
version 1.45 of existing port devel/p5-Workflow

- "portlint -ACN" says: looks fine.
- Tested with poudriere 3.1.99.20171005 at 11.1-STABLE r324504 with perl-5.24.3

- built-in perl tests fail altogether.
It is a known issue of tests themselves,
and does not prevent software from working fine: https://rt.cpan.org/Public/Dist/Display.html?Name=SPOPS
